claim_text: The evidence package is restricted to the approved top-five NSFC cohort; the full 20-team universe is outside the analysis-ready scope.
allowed_paper_wording: Report the cohort as power-limited top-five NSFC evidence with N=53 primary cells.
forbidden_wording: Do not generalize this run to all 20 teams or to an unrestricted NSFC universe.

claim_text: The coordination outcome is an official/generated report score and should be treated as an official-score prediction target.
allowed_paper_wording: Use official/generated coordination score or official report score.
forbidden_wording: Do not describe the score as an independent human expert criterion.

claim_text: The corrected primary LOTO comparison has a weak favorable numerical direction but is nonsignificant and power-limited.
allowed_paper_wording: The corrected top-five primary comparison showed a weak favorable direction, but p=0.30 and the confidence interval includes zero.
forbidden_wording: Do not write that the direction validates IPV or establishes a stable effect.

claim_text: A robust held-out increment over the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was not demonstrated.
allowed_paper_wording: No robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated (power-limited, top-five cohort, N=53; apparent favorable direction not IPV-specific).
forbidden_wording: Do not claim independent new signal beyond trajectory or kinematic features.

allowed_paper_wording: LOSO was approximately zero and does not establish scenario generalization.
forbidden_wording: Do not present the primary direction as scenario-general.

claim_text: The safe-subset agreement flag is not usable as robustness evidence because S1 and S2 duplicate the primary sample and S3 is low-n/null.
allowed_paper_wording: Safe-subset robustness was not established; S1 and S2 duplicate the primary cells and S3 is too small to support the direction.
forbidden_wording: Do not cite the mechanical safe-subset flag as independent robustness support.

claim_text: The apparent favorable direction is not IPV-specific because multiple controls match or exceed the primary delta and degradation controls failed.
allowed_paper_wording: The favorable direction was not specific to directional IPV diagnostics; controls matched or exceeded the primary delta.
forbidden_wording: Do not call the favorable direction IPV-specific or robust to controls.

claim_text: Independent replication verifies the corrected data/model path and reproduces the favorable direction, but not a robust utility claim.
allowed_paper_wording: Replication confirmed implementation soundness while leaving significance, generalization, and specificity unresolved.
forbidden_wording: Do not equate implementation reproduction with validation of predictive utility.

claim_text: H3 blind annotation is blocked because no real two-human labels exist.
allowed_paper_wording: No blind-annotation result is included in the Tier basis.
forbidden_wording: Do not cite simulated or template labels as human evidence.

claim_text: NPC matching is not identifiable from allowed fields and is boundary-only.
allowed_paper_wording: NPC material can only be framed as unmatched boundary context; future work would require matched opportunity structure evidence.
forbidden_wording: Do not make a causal or same-trial NPC effect statement from this run.

claim_text: State-dependence results are exploratory boundary mapping with no FDR-stable favorable stratum.
allowed_paper_wording: State-dependence did not rescue the primary result; no interpretable row reached q<=0.10.
forbidden_wording: Do not use local strata as robustness or mechanism proof.

claim_text: Conformal calibration is InterHub-only and defines an abstention/support boundary.
allowed_paper_wording: Describe the conformal element as an InterHub-calibrated support boundary.
forbidden_wording: Do not state that NSFC achieved a guaranteed conformal coverage level.

claim_text: D_comp and D_yield have the expected sign interpretation under Gate 0.
allowed_paper_wording: D_comp marks below-norm competitive shortfall and D_yield marks above-norm yielding excess relative to the InterHub human conditional norm.
forbidden_wording: Do not invert the D_comp/D_yield direction or treat sign-flip controls as positive validation.
